response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics perfectly match the reference Japanese lyrics for 'PHOENIX PRAYER'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for transcribing the Japanese vocals. A clean, poetic English translation was manually crafted since no official English translation was provided in the reference. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the vocal onset. Multi-phrase lines and rapid sections have been segmented logically with precise start and end times to maintain readability and eliminate cascading delays. No subtitles are generated during instrumental-only segments.

subtitles.original: 劫々とつづくショートショート
subtitles.english: The endless, repeating short stories continue

subtitles.original: 喪失は絶対零度だ
今夜はリィンカーネーション
哀しみが
混沌の子守唄うたってるよ
運命に理由があるのならば
subtitles.english: If there is a reason for fate,

subtitles.original: すべてを賭けてみたいの
subtitles.english: I want to bet everything on it

subtitles.original: あなたを守りたい
どこまでも高く飛べるわ
subtitles.english: I can fly higher and higher, to anywhere

subtitles.original: どこまでも強く強くなれるわ
subtitles.english: I can become stronger and stronger, to anywhere

subtitles.original: 信じて わたしに 出会えたキセキ
subtitles.english: Believe in the miracle of meeting me

subtitles.original: 切り開くは、不死鳥の炎
subtitles.english: The one that blazes a path is the phoenix's flame

subtitles.original: 説いて あなたのドグマ
blackout blackout
眼差しに泣きたくなるの
subtitles.english: Your gaze makes me want to cry

subtitles.original: flashback flashback
振りほどけ ascend
挑み続けろ
飄々と佇むホット・ショット
subtitles.english: An aloof and detached hot shot

subtitles.original: わたしが必要でしょ?
今夜はリィンカーネーション
正しさが
ストレイシープ最前線に押し出すよ
subtitles.english: ...pushes the stray sheep to the very front line

subtitles.original: 運命に理由があるのならば
subtitles.english: If there is a reason for fate,

subtitles.original: 優しい世界をあげたい
subtitles.english: I want to give you a kind world

subtitles.original: あなたを包むわ
どこまでも速く射抜くわ
subtitles.english: I will shoot through, faster than anywhere

subtitles.original: どこまでも熱く熱く焦がすわ
subtitles.english: I will burn, hotter and hotter, to anywhere

subtitles.original: 信じて わたしに 出会えたキセキ
subtitles.english: Believe in the miracle of meeting me

subtitles.original: 切り開くは、不死鳥の炎
subtitles.english: The one that blazes a path is the phoenix's flame

subtitles.original: 説いて あなたのドグマ
blackout blackout
肩越しに光を見せて
subtitles.english: Show me the light over your shoulder

subtitles.original: flashback flashback
許さない betray
進み続けろ 尽きるまで
subtitles.english: Keep moving forward until the end

subtitles.original: 傍にいると
鼓動が速くて 目眩がする
subtitles.english: ...my heart beats fast, and I feel dizzy

subtitles.original: 全て捧げる
もう決めたの
最後のチャンスだから
subtitles.english: Because this is the last chance...

subtitles.original: もう離さない
あなたに潜る
未来の風が
混ざり合っていく
